The '''YV-260 light freighter''' was a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] manufactured by [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]].<ref name="Tempest" />

Measuring 41.5 meters in length, and possessing a blocky cockpit like others in the [[YV-series/Legends|YV series]], the YV-260 was produced during the last years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Highly modifiable like most [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] designs, the ship could be heavily militarized.<ref name="Tempest" />

One notable YV-260 freighter was the [[Vengeance (YV-260 light freighter)|''Vengeance'']], which was one of several modified [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] YV-260 freighters operated by the [[Bomu Clan]]. Modified for speed, enhanced weapons, heavier shields, and increased passenger capacity for prisoners and troops at the cost of cargo space, the [[Bomu Clan]] operated a small fleet of these ships while marauding as [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]].<ref name="Tempest" />

==Behind the scenes==
There seems to be a small image discrepancy in [[Tempest Feud]] where the image for the Vengeance, a YV-260 light freighter, is displayed in the [[Etti light cruiser]] encounter. As the image lacks the ten quad laser cannons of the larger cruiser (having an armament consistent with the Vengeance), and possesses the blocky cockpit design distinct to the YV-series, it is safe to say that the image was misplaced in the sourcebook - especially as the image is not definitively tied to an info or stat block, and is simply free standing.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tempest Feud]]''
